app.title: LP
app.name: LocalProf
app.subtitle: Form template: React Hook Form + Zod + Chakra v3 field primitives.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.description: Manage review collection flows and templates.
reviews.emptyState: Review tools will appear in this section.

surveys.title: Surveys
surveys.description: Create and monitor survey programs for your audience.
surveys.emptyState: Survey management widgets will be added here.

scans.title: Scans
scans.description: Configure scan points and track engagement events.
scans.emptyState: Scan analytics and setup controls will be available here.

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.description: Build outreach campaigns and track delivery quality.
campaigns.emptyState: Campaign tools are planned for this section.

locations.title: Locations
locations.description: Configure business locations and map channels to them.
locations.emptyState: Location configuration modules will appear here.

locationsPage.createDescription: Add a new location to your account.
locationsPage.readonlyDescription: You can view this location, but you do not have permission to edit it.
locationsPage.notFoundDescription: This location does not exist or is not available in your account.
locationsPage.locationNotFound: Location from URL was not found.

validation.websiteMax: Website must be at most 200 characters
